description: Create an active admin user (User Name: 'cs_lead_jones', First Name: 'Patricia', Last Name: 'Jones', Email: 'patricia.jones@example.com', Password: 'CsLead2025!') assigned to a new restricted admin role named 'Customer Service Lead'. The role must have access ONLY to Dashboard, Sales (all sub-resources), and Customers (all sub-resources), and no access to Catalog, Marketing, Content, Reports, Stores, or System. If not logged in, use admin/Admin1234!.
